options.content:
### Catchup logs
This dashboard shows the **system lifecycle timeline** (boot / ready / shutdown / connect / reconnect).

To **browse and search all logs by area**, use **[Logs Drilldown](/a/grafana-lokiexplore-app/explore)** — pick the `catchup` service, then drill by the `component` and `level` labels. For ad-hoc LogQL use **[Explore](/explore)** with `{service_name="catchup"}`.

panels.title: System Lifecycle (boot / ready / shutdown / connect / reconnect)
